focusPoints.label: How she frames Senior-level impact and leverage
focusPoints.reason: Whether she can clearly articulate what moved because of her work, not just what she delivered, and where her leverage is coming from.

focusPoints.label: Influence and visibility with cross-functional stakeholders
focusPoints.reason: What she’s doing to build trust and raise signal with stakeholders, especially when results aren’t automatically noticed.

focusPoints.label: Handling cross-functional friction without stalling
focusPoints.reason: How she reduces friction at team boundaries—what she escalates, what she pre-wires, and how she keeps other teams in the loop.

focusPoints.label: Tradeoffs: execution depth vs strategic calls
focusPoints.reason: What calls she’s making on where to go deep in execution versus where to invest in influence, visibility, and early alignment for higher leverage.

name: Sarah
notes: Sarah is delivering, but there are signs she may be over-rotating on execution while underweighting influence and visibility. I want to understand whether she has a clear view of the performance bar at Senior level and where she sees gaps in her current approach. This conversation should test how she frames impact, how she handles cross-functional friction, and whether she has a practical plan to raise signal with stakeholders instead of waiting for good work to be noticed automatically.
